addy.name: Addy.io
use_cases: Best for people who use Proton but want to compartmentalize services
Best for people on a budget who don't send or receive many emails (Lite plan)
pros: Discounts to other services available through their [partnerships](https://addy.io/perks/)

mailx.name: MailX
use_cases: Best for people who use [IVPN](/guides/less-important/vpns) or [SPN](/guides/less-important/vpns/#honorable-mention-safing-private-network)
Best for people who want granular control over their DNS filter
pros: Included in IVPN's Plus or Pro Suite plans
cons: Cannot be purchased as a standalone product, unlike Addy.io or SimpleLogin

simplelogin.name: SimpleLogin
use_cases: Best for people who use Proton and prefer to bundle or like ecosystems
Best for people on a budget who do send or receive lots emails
pros: Included in Proton's Unlimited or higher plans
Can be purchased as a standalone product if you'd prefer
